_meta.purpose: R4 (docs/migration/decisions.md): Vercel deploy-history receipt for the 'cabina' project, exported before the M9 project rename (cabina -> oravan) so the migration's deploy record survives the rename. Part of the R1-R6 record-preservation set.
_meta.scope: Migration era: S0 preflight (#54) through S6-S7 (#61) plus the two bracketing nightly syncs. This is the complete rebrand deploy record (S0-S7, all READY). The pre-migration main-build tail (PRs #1-#53, before the 2026-07-06 nightly) remains in the Vercel dashboard and can be appended by paginating list_deployments further.
_meta.identity_invariant_note: The 2026-07-06 nightly committed as 'rostra-sync' and the 2026-07-07 nightly as 'oravan-sync' (the S3 sync-bot rename), both under the unchanged load-bearing email 223600121+cm2489@users.noreply.github.com, both deployed READY - confirming the sync-bot rename deployed cleanly (kickoff identity-invariant check).
